tags.name: `mc-select`
tags.description:
Purpose: A custom select dropdown component for selecting one option from a list.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to present a list of options for the user to choose from.
When not to use: For single input fields or when space is not a concern.
Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs
Alternative component names: Dropdown, ComboBox, Select Box, Picklist

Events:

  * `input` {`InputEvent`} - Fired when the option is selected.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired on mc-input click.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input is going out of focus.

  * `clearbuttonclick` {`CustomEvent`} - Fires when the clear button is pressed.

  * `optionselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when the option is selected, includes detail option item object.

  * `opened` {`CustomEvent<boolean>`} - Fired when dropdown gets opened.

  * `closed` {`CustomEvent<boolean>`} - Fired when dropdown gets closed.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the options and dividers go

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-input.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-input.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-input.

Attributes:

  * `labels` {`ICommonLabels | undefined`} - Labels object for customizing component text.
If not provided, labels are automatically loaded based on document's lang attribute.

  * `data` {IMcSelectData[{ label: string; value: string | number; icon?: string; disabled?: boolean; group?: string; }]} - The data to be displayed in dropdown. It is an array of objects`<IMcSelectData>`

  * `optionsheight` {string} - Sets the max height of the popup list with options. If not set, the height will be determined by the number of options and available space.

  * `optionswidth` {string} - Sets the max width of the popup list with options. If set to 'trigger', the width will be the same as the trigger element.

  * `open` {boolean} - Sets the select's drop down to open on initial render.
This is useful when you want to show the options immediately without user interaction.

  * `listsearch` {boolean} - Enables filtering of the list items, with build-in search input in the drop-down. If set to true, the list will be filtered by the input value.

  * `listsearchplaceholder` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `filtertype` {IMcListFilterType} - When listsearch is true, this property sets the filter type.
- 'contains' - the list will be filtered by the input value, and the list items that contain the input value will be shown.
- 'startsWith' - the list will be filtered by the input value, and the list items that start with the input value will be shown.

  * `matchlabelonly` {boolean} - When true, only searches in the label attribute of list items. When false (default), searches in the full text including sublabels.

Properties:

  * `trailingicon` {`string`} - 

  * `keepclearbuttonvisible` {`boolean`} - 

  * `optionselected` {CustomEvent<IMcSelectOptionSelectedDetail>} - Custom event emitted on option selected (sends the whole option item as detail).

  * `labels` {`ICommonLabels | undefined`} - Labels object for customizing component text.
If not provided, labels are automatically loaded based on document's lang attribute.

  * `computedLabels` {`Required<ICommonLabels>`} - 

  * `preventInputBlurEvent` {`boolean`} - 

  * `closureDueToItemSelection` {`boolean`} - 

  * `placeholderOption` {`boolean`} - 

  * `selectedOption` {`T | undefined`} - 

  * `mcOptions` {`IMcSelectOption[] | undefined`} - 

  * `labelSelector` {`string`} - 

  * `pressedAlphanumeric` {`string`} - 

  * `pressedAlphanumericTimeout` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `selectedOptionLabel` {`string | Node | undefined`} - 

  * `slotElements` {`HTMLElement[] | undefined`} - 

  * `actionkeys` {`string[]`} - 

  * `listType` {`ListTypes`} - 

  * `currentGroup` {`string | null`} - 

  * `data` {IMcSelectData[{ label: string; value: string | number; icon?: string; disabled?: boolean; group?: string; }]} - The data to be displayed in dropdown. It is an array of objects`<IMcSelectData>`

  * `mcPopover` {`IMcPopover | undefined`} - 

  * `mcList` {`IMcList | undefined`} - 

  * `ariaExpanded` {`"undefined" | "true" | "false"`} - 

  * `optionsheight` {string} - Sets the max height of the popup list with options. If not set, the height will be determined by the number of options and available space.

  * `optionswidth` {string} - Sets the max width of the popup list with options. If set to 'trigger', the width will be the same as the trigger element.

  * `open` {boolean} - Sets the select's drop down to open on initial render.
This is useful when you want to show the options immediately without user interaction.

  * `listsearch` {boolean} - Enables filtering of the list items, with build-in search input in the drop-down. If set to true, the list will be filtered by the input value.

  * `listsearchplaceholder` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `filtertype` {IMcListFilterType} - When listsearch is true, this property sets the filter type.
- 'contains' - the list will be filtered by the input value, and the list items that contain the input value will be shown.
- 'startsWith' - the list will be filtered by the input value, and the list items that start with the input value will be shown.

  * `customfilter` {function} - Custom filter function for list search. When provided, this function will be used instead of the built-in filter types.
The function receives the text to search in and the search value, and should return an array of matching substrings.

  * `matchlabelonly` {boolean} - When true, only searches in the label attribute of list items. When false (default), searches in the full text including sublabels.

  * `langObserver` {`MutationObserver | undefined`} - 

  * `handleDocumentLangChange` - Request update when document lang changes

attributes.description:
`labels` {`ICommonLabels | undefined`} - Labels object for customizing component text.
If not provided, labels are automatically loaded based on document's lang attribute.

Property: labels
